case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LATIMER VLADIMIR MONCADA ESTRADA

docket_entries.description: AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, LATIMER VLADIMIR MONCADA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/15/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO NOV-15-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LATIMER VLADIMIR MONCADA ESTRADA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTRADA, LATIMER VLADIMIR MONCADA $477.40 PRINCIPAL, $45.64 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $608.04, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $463.40 PRINCIPAL PLUS $45.64 INTEREST ON PRINCIPAL PLUS ONE LATE FEE OF $14 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
